glosses.ja: 膨らませる; 腫れる

sentences.target: Je gonfle le ballon pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ɡɔ̃fl lə balɔ̃ puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Je gonfle le ballon pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ɡɔ̃fl lə balɔ̃ puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: I'm inflating the balloon for the party.
translations.es: Estoy inflando el globo para la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich puste den Ballon für die Party auf.
translations.it: Sto gonfiando il palloncino per la festa.
translations.ko: 파티를 위해 풍선에 공기를 넣고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为派对给气球充气。
translations.pt: Estou enchendo o balão para a festa.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thổi bóng bay cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik blaas de ballon op voor het feest.
translations.uk: Я надуваю повітряну кульку для вечірки.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी के लिए गुब्बारा फुला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φουσκώνω το μπαλόνι για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg blåser opp ballongen til festen.
translations.id: Saya sedang meniup balon untuk pesta.
translations.sv: Jag blåser upp ballongen till festen.
translations.da: Jeg puster ballonen op til festen.
translations.ja: パーティーのために風船をふくらませています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with 'Je' and takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'ballon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gonfle'.
Preposition expressing purpose; introduces the prepositional complement 'la fête'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu peux gonfler le pneu du vélo.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɡɔ̃fle lə pnø dy velo/

translations.fr: Tu peux gonfler le pneu du vélo.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɡɔ̃fle lə pnø dy velo/
translations.en: Can you inflate the bike tire?
translations.es: ¿Puedes inflar el neumático de la bicicleta?
translations.it: Puoi gonfiare la gomma della bici?
translations.ko: 자전거 타이어에 바람 좀 넣어 줄래요?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能把自行车的轮胎打气吗？
translations.yue: 你可以幫單車個胎打氣嗎？
translations.pt: Você pode encher o pneu da bicicleta?
translations.he: אתה יכול לנפח את הצמיג של האופניים?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể bơm lốp xe đạp không?
translations.hi: क्या तुम साइकिल का टायर फुला सकते हो?
translations.pl: Czy możesz napompować koło w rowerze?
translations.el: Μπορείς να φουσκώσεις το λάστιχο του ποδηλάτου;
translations.ja: 自転車のタイヤに空気を入れてくれますか？

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive ('gonfler').
Verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'pneu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gonfler'.
Preposition 'de' fused with the article 'le'; introduces the genitive complement 'vélo'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Ça me gonfle trop, cette attente.

translations.fr: Ça me gonfle trop, cette attente.
translations.it: Questa attesa mi dà molto fastidio.
translations.tr: Bu bekleyiş beni gerçekten sinir ediyor.
translations.vi: Việc chờ đợi này làm tôi rất bực.
translations.hi: यह इंतज़ार मुझे बहुत परेशान करता है.
translations.el: Αυτή η αναμονή με εκνευρίζει πολύ.
translations.id: Penantian ini benar-benar membuat saya kesal.
translations.sv: Den här väntan gör mig verkligen irriterad.
translations.ro: Așteptarea asta mă enervează foarte tare.
translations.ja: この待ち時間は本当にイライラします。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, 3rd person singular (colloquial); subject of 'gonfle'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of 'gonfle'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here used figuratively ('to annoy').
Adverb of degree; intensifies the predicate ('too much').
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; determiner of 'attente'.
Common noun, feminine singular; dislocated/appositive noun phrase specifying what causes the annoyance.

sentences.target: On gonfle le matelas pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɡɔ̃fl lə matla puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On gonfle le matelas pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɡɔ̃fl lə matla puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're inflating the mattress for tonight.
translations.es: Estamos inflando el colchón para esta noche.
translations.de: Wir pumpen die Matratze für heute Abend auf.
translations.it: Stiamo gonfiando il materasso per stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤을 위해 매트리스에 공기를 넣고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为今晚给床垫充气。
translations.yue: 我哋為今晚喺度幫充氣床充氣。
translations.pt: Estamos enchendo o colchão para hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu gece için şişme yatağı şişiriyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bơm đệm cho tối nay.
translations.nl: We blazen de matras op voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми надуваємо матрац на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: हम आज रात के लिए गद्दा फुला रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi blåser opp madrassen til i kveld.
translations.id: Kami sedang memompa kasur untuk malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi blåser upp madrassen till i kväll.
translations.da: Vi puster madrassen op til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜のためにマットレスに空気を入れています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (colloquial 'we'); grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreement with 'on'); takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'matelas'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gonfle'.
Preposition expressing purpose/temporal target; introduces 'ce soir'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'pour' indicating time.
